title: Piquant Kenyan Vegetable Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy Kenyan dish featuring a variety of vegetables stir-fried in peanut oil, perfect for a date night dinner.
instructions: Heat the peanut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the grated carrots and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the sliced zucchini and bell pepper, and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the kenyan spice blend, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stir-fry for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the piquant kenyan vegetable stir fry hot over rice or with naan bread.
